description: Case width: 27 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: OvalWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortRed leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleSilver coloured dial with branding at the 3 hour mark and brand logo at the 9 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
